description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nReduces <color=#28d9ed>damage taken</color> by all allies by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>. This effect stacks with skills of the same name and is removed upon the caster's death.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>받는 피해</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 감소시킵니다. 이 효과는 동일한 이름을 가진 스킬들과 효과가 합산되며, 사망 시 해제됩니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>受けるダメージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>DOWNさせる。同名のスキルと効果が重複した場合、効果が合算される。この効果は倒れた時、解除される。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n使全体友军<color=#28d9ed>所受伤害</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。该效果可与同名技能效果叠加,且在死亡时解除。
